Examples.Title: Get Continuous Heart rate samples with range
Examples.Description: Get users continuous heart rate values for given date range. Supported devices
Examples.Code:
### Get Continuous Heart rate samples with range
GET {{host}}/v3/users/continuous-heart-rate?from={{from}}&to={{to}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Request was successful.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid request.
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized.
# 403
# Description: User has not accepted all mandatory consents.

Examples.Title: Get Continuous Heart rate samples
Examples.Description: Get users continuous heart rate values for given date. Supported devices
Examples.Code:
### Get Continuous Heart rate samples
GET {{host}}/v3/users/continuous-heart-rate/{{date}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Request was successful.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid request.
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized.
# 403
# Description: User has not accepted all mandatory consents.
# 404
# Description: No data found for date.

Examples.Title: List exercises
Examples.Description: After successfully initiating a transaction, training sessions included within it can be retrieved with the provided transactionId.
Examples.Code:
### List exercises
# @name listExercises
GET {{host}}/v3/users/{{user-id}}/exercise-transactions/{{transaction-id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/xml

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Return list of hyperlinks to training sessions contained within the transaction.
# Content-Type: application/json, application/xml
# 204
# Description: No content when there is no data available.
# 403
# Description: User has not accepted all mandatory consents.

Examples.Title: List physical infos
Examples.Description:
List new physical info data.
After successfully initiating a transaction, physical infos included within it can be retrieved with the provided transactionId.
Examples.Code:
### List physical infos
# @name listPhysicalInfos
GET {{host}}/v3/users/{{user-id}}/physical-information-transactions/{{transaction-id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/xml

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Return list of hyperlinks to physical information contained within the transaction.
# Content-Type: application/json, application/xml
# 204
# Description: No content when there is no data available.
# 403
# Description: User has not accepted all mandatory consents.
# 404
# Description: No transaction was found with given transaction id.

Examples.Title: Get user information
Examples.Description:
List user basic information.
Note: Although it is possible to get users weight and height from this resource, the [get physical info](#get-physical-info) should be used instead.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Polar;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.
